body.title: CLOSED: Create python_diagnostic_base_class repo — merged logging+perf base
body.result: DiagnosticBase micro-package created at ~/dev/src/python_diagnostic_base_class — loguru+TaggedLogger+Stopwatch+CSV+gc naming, 36 tests green, dd981ed
body.description:
Create a new standalone repo python_diagnostic_base_class with a single publishable micro-package. Merges the best of SWADL's base class (instance naming via gc.get_referrers, hierarchical get_name with parent traversal, substitution engine, dump/bannerize, lazy per-class logger, kwargs absorption, context manager pattern) and ADC log path conventions. No dependency on SWADL or ADC.

**Logging backend:** loguru. Structured records, colored output, built-in rotation, and .bind() for tag routing — no LogRecord.extra gymnastics needed.

**Tagged logging design:**
- self.logger.debug/info/warning/error(msg) — standard levels, no tag
- self.logger.perf('msg') — callable tag-scoped sub-logger, defaults to INFO, tag bound via loguru .bind()
- self.logger.perf.debug('msg') — explicit level + tag
- self.debug/info/warning/error(msg) — convenience passthroughs on base class, unchanged
- __getattr__ on TaggedLogger proxy returns tag-scoped sub-logger on demand; no pre-registration needed
- Handlers filter by tag (PerformanceHandler writes tag=perf rows to rolling CSV)

**From SWADL:** instance naming (gc trick + hierarchical path), __str__ identity, lazy per-class logger, get_timestamp(), dump()/bannerize, apply_kwargs, resolve_substitutions, context manager, timeout_remaining
**From ADC:** datacenter_logs/<device>/perf/YYYY-MM-DD.perf.csv convention, device_id stamping on perf rows

**Affected files:** new repo — pyproject.toml, diagnostic_base/base.py, diagnostic_base/tagged_logger.py, diagnostic_base/perf.py, README.md
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; CSV flat-file rolling log; pip-installable standalone; loguru as only logging dep
**Scope boundary:** logging + perf + instance naming only; no automation or device/rack lifecycle logic
**Test plan:** stopwatch (clean/exception/context-manager), CSV rolling+pruning, instance naming (gc), tagged logger routing, log output format
